pages.title: Overview
pages.purpose: Introduce the Gestion_Doc system, a Django-based document management platform with finite state machine workflows, external service integrations, and role-based access control

pages.title: Architecture & Design
pages.purpose: Explain the overall system architecture, including the Django project structure, application organization, and design patterns

pages.title: Django Project Configuration
pages.purpose: Document the core Django project files including settings, URL routing, and application initialization

pages.title: Database Schema & Models
pages.purpose: Detail the database structure, including all models, relationships, and migration history

pages.title: URL Routing Structure
pages.purpose: Explain how HTTP requests are routed through the system, including root URLs and application-specific routing

pages.title: Document Management System (Gestion_Doc_FSM)
pages.purpose: Comprehensive overview of the document management application, including its FSM workflow, team assignments, and state transitions

pages.title: Document Models & State Machine
pages.purpose: Detail the DocumentoTecnico and Equipo models, explaining the finite state machine implementation and state transition logic

pages.title: Document Workflow & Views
pages.purpose: Explain how document state transitions are triggered through views, including the avanzar_estado function and permission checks

pages.title: Document Administration Interface
pages.purpose: Document the Django admin configuration for documents, including FSMTransitionMixin integration and list display customization

pages.title: Database Migrations
pages.purpose: Detail the initial database migration that creates the DocumentoTecnico and Equipo tables with their relationships

pages.title: User Management System (Usuario)
pages.purpose: Overview of the user management application, including file preview functionality and OneDrive integration

pages.title: File Preview System
pages.purpose: Explain the FilePreview model and how temporary signed URLs are generated and managed for file access

pages.title: OneDrive Integration
pages.purpose: Document the onedrive_utils module, including authentication with Microsoft Graph API and file operations

pages.title: External Service Integrations
pages.purpose: Comprehensive overview of all external service integrations including authentication, storage, and communication services

pages.title: Microsoft OAuth Authentication
pages.purpose: Detail the Microsoft OAuth integration, including configuration, authentication flow, and callback handling

pages.title: Google Cloud Storage Integration
pages.purpose: Document Google Cloud Storage and Google Drive integration, including service account authentication and bucket configuration

pages.title: Email Service (Gmail SMTP)
pages.purpose: Explain the Gmail SMTP configuration for sending transactional emails

pages.title: Deployment & Server Configuration
pages.purpose: Guide for deploying the application using WSGI or ASGI servers, including configuration and environment setup

pages.title: WSGI Deployment
pages.purpose: Detail the WSGI configuration and deployment with servers like Gunicorn or uWSGI

pages.title: ASGI Deployment
pages.purpose: Detail the ASGI configuration for asynchronous deployment with servers like Uvicorn or Daphne

pages.title: Database Configuration
pages.purpose: Explain the PostgreSQL database configuration and Docker setup

pages.title: Development Environment
pages.purpose: Document development tools, IDE configuration, and version control settings

pages.title: VS Code Configuration
pages.purpose: Detail the VS Code workspace settings, particularly Python REPL configuration

pages.title: Version Control & Gitignore
pages.purpose: Explain the Git configuration and which files are excluded from version control

pages.title: Testing
pages.purpose: Document the testing infrastructure and test configuration
